name_cn:
Genuine quality
5BG231, Miu family new summer mesh woven beach tote, smooth grass woven crochet on outer layer, canvas lining inside, comes with detachable small bag, can be used as a standalone mini shoulder bag or clutch, multiple carrying ways, suitable for various outfits, bold innovative design perfectly interprets Miu's unconventionality and casualness, this year's super hot🔥style, very light, casual and lazy temperament, huge capacity, 100% head-turner on the street, size 35 X 40Cm, with original bag
